name: hostnet-panel
description: HostNet hosting panel and hmail branded webmail — standalone project

scripts.dev:concurrent: concurrently -n api,hmail,hostnet -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w hmail-api" "npm run dev -w hmail-web" "npm run dev -w hostnet-web"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate -w hmail-api && npm run build -w hmail-api && npm run build -w hmail-web && npm run build -w hostnet-web
scripts.setup:postgres: npm run db:migrate -w hmail-api && npm run db:seed -w hmail-api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w hmail-api && npm run lint -w hmail-web && npm run lint -w hostnet-web
